name: test condition for scoring_format_hash param, multiple fantasy points from play
description: Test case for test condition for scoring_format_hash param, multiple fantasy points from play
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_80b57b858748" as materialized (select "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total, "nfl_games"."year" from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "role_union"."pid", "nfl_games"."year" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0), "rate_aggregate_3b5bcf99da27" as materialized (select "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total, "nfl_games"."year" from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "role_union"."pid", "nfl_games"."year" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0) select "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_80b57b858748.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_3b5bcf99da27.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_1, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."year", "player"."pos" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" left join "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" on "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."pid" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" and "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."year" = 2023 inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_80b57b858748" on "rate_aggregate_80b57b858748"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rate_aggregate_80b57b858748"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "rate_aggregate_3b5bcf99da27" on "rate_aggregate_3b5bcf99da27"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rate_aggregate_3b5bcf99da27"."year" = "player_years"."year" inner join "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f" on "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."pid" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" and "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."year" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."year" and "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."scoring_format_hash" = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' where "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."scoring_format_hash" = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' and player.pos IN ('WR') and tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f.points_per_game > '0' group by player.fname, player.lname, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."points_per_game", "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."year", "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" asc limit 500
